title: Add interactive /hooks and /permissions management UIs (CC parity)
description: CC ref: commands/permissions/permissions.tsx:5-9. CC /permissions renders PermissionRuleList TUI — interactive list of all active allow/deny rules with a 'retry denied commands' action that re-queues previously denied tool calls (context.setMessages). CC /hooks (separate command, not yet read) likely provides similar interactive management for lifecycle hooks. OC: both commands entirely absent. Parent spec: #539.
